name: Melo
report: The mint function in the MELO token contract is publicly accessible without any access control, allowing anyone to mint arbitrary amounts of tokens. In the attack transaction 0x3f1973fe56de5ecd59a815d3b14741cf48385903b0ccfe248f7f10c2765061f7, the attacker minted 146,965,900.2021899513963488 MELO tokens and immediately swapped them for 90,488.67 BSC-USD (approximately $90,377), resulting in a significant loss for the protocol.
